items.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِنَا غَيْثاً مُغِيثاً مَرِيئاً مَرِيعاً، نَافِعاً غَيْرَ ضَارٍّ، عَاجِلاً غَيْرَ آجِلٍ)).
items.english_text: (O Allah, send upon us helpful, wholesome and healthy rain, beneficial not harmful rain, now, not later.)
items.transliteration: (Allahummas-qina ghaythan mugheethan maree-an mureeAAan, nafiAAan, ghayra dar, AAajilan ghayra ajil.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahummas-qina ghaythan mugheethan maree-an mureeAAan, nafiAAan, ghayra dar, AAajilan ghayra ajil.)

items.english_text: (O Allah, relieve us, O Allah, relieve us, O Allah, relieve us.)

items.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِ عِبَادَكَ، وَبَهَائِمَكَ، وَانْشُرْ رَحْمَتَكَ، وَأَحْيِي بَلَدَكَ الْمَيِّتَ)).
items.english_text: (O Allah, provide water for Your servants and Your cattle, spread out Your mercy and resurrect Your dead land.)
items.transliteration: (Allahummas-qi AAibadak, wabaha-imak, wanshur rahmatak, wa-ahyi baladakal-mayyit.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahummas-qi AAibadak, wabaha-imak, wanshur rahmatak, wa-ahyi baladakal-mayyit.)
